description:
Because:
- The upgrade-nx branch was 62 commits behind main; functional tests
  need to run against current main.

This commit:
- Resolves tsconfig.base.json conflict by keeping the nx-upgrade "./"
  path-prefix convention and adding main's new aliases
  (@fxa/free-access-program, @fxa/payments/api-server/server-utils).
- Regenerates yarn.lock via `yarn install` against the merged manifests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
